summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Defiance KSM TipRanks Analyst ETF (RANK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the TipRanks US Momentum Analysts index. The fund tracks an index of US-listed companies selected based on analyst buy recommendations and price momentum. The fund focuses on companies with strong analyst conviction and positive market trends. RANK was launched on Jun 29, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.
